race.description: Sub Zero Air Conditioning Maiden Plate
race.comment: PRINCE OF SYNERGY (2) is on a quick turnaround after a solid third over 1200m at Toowoomba 10 days ago. Good effort last start and should be in the finish. ROYSTON (3) was prominent into the straight last time but faltered late to finish fourth over 2200m at Beaumont (Newcastle). Well placed on this occasion and gets his chance to break the ice. HELL TO THE LINE (8) is a five-start maiden who resumed from a spell last start and was beaten 8 lengths when eighth over 1200m at Toowoomba. Should progress from that last outing and poses a genuine threat. SOLOACT (10) is a son of Trapeze Artist out of Le Ciel who was sold for NZD $120,000 (NZB 2024 Karaka - Book 1). In the placings at the most recent trial under today's rider Jag Guthmann-Chester. Worth including.
